channel.title: Dad Joke of the Day
channel.description: A fresh dad joke every day. Get the app at dadjokes.vip

item.title: Mahatma Gandhi, as you know, walked barefoot most of the time, which produced an impressive set of calluses on his feet. He also ate very little, which made him rather frail and with his odd diet, he suffered from bad breath.
item.description:
Mahatma Gandhi, as you know, walked barefoot most of the time, which produced an impressive set of calluses on his feet. He also ate very little, which made him rather frail and with his odd diet, he suffered from bad breath.
This made him a super calloused fragile mystic hexed by halitosis.

item.title: Why was the broom late for the meeting?
item.description:
Why was the broom late for the meeting?
He overswept.

item.title: What kind of music do planets listen to?
item.description:
What kind of music do planets listen to?
Nep-tunes.

item.title: What do Alexander the Great and Winnie the Pooh have in common?
item.description:
What do Alexander the Great and Winnie the Pooh have in common?
Same middle name.

item.title: What did the rabbi say when he went skydiving?
item.description:
What did the rabbi say when he went skydiving?
Shalom below!

item.title: What did the chef say when his wife asked why he was late?
item.description:
What did the chef say when his wife asked why he was late?
"I got curry-ed away."

item.title: I tried to buy some camouflage
item.description:
I tried to buy some camouflage
pants but couldn't find any.

item.title: Did you know Julius Caesar was a great multitasker?
item.description:
Did you know Julius Caesar was a great multitasker?
He could dictate multiple letters at once - he was a Roman processor.

item.title: What's a nun's favorite type of math?
item.description:
What's a nun's favorite type of math?
Cross multiplication.

item.title: Why did the pastor start a bakery?
item.description:
Why did the pastor start a bakery?
He kneaded the dough!
